name: Expert
skills: acrobatics: +9, performance: +5, persuasion: +5, sleight of hand: +6, stealth: +9
languages: Common, plus one of your choice

traits.name: Helpful
entries: The expert can take the Help action as a bonus action, and the creature who receives the help gains a 1d6 bonus to the d20 roll. If that roll is an attack roll, the creature can forgo adding the bonus to it, and then if the attack hits, the creature can add the bonus to the attack's damage roll against one target.

traits.name: Tools
entries: The expert has thieves' tools and a musical instrument.

actions.name: Extra Attack
entries: The expert can attack twice, instead of once, whenever it takes the Attack action on its turn.

actions.name: Shortsword
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage.

actions.name: Dagger
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. *Hit:* 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage.

actions.name: Shortbow
entries: *Ranged Weapon Attack:* +6 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. *Hit:* 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage.

actions.name: Sting
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. *Hit:* 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 11 Constitution saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hit points, the target is stable but poisoned for 1 hour, even after regaining hit points, and is paralyzed while poisoned in this way.

name: Spellcaster (Healer)
languages: Common, plus one of your choice

traits.name: Potent Cantrip
entries: The spellcaster can add its spellcasting ability modifier to the damage it deals with any cantrip.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Healer)
entries: The spellcaster's spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks). The spellcaster has following cleric spells prepared:
0: guidance, light, resistance, sacred flame
1 (4 slots): bless, cure wounds, shield of faith
2 (3 slots): aid, lesser restoration
3 (3 slots): protection from energy, revivify
4 (1 slots): death ward

actions.name: Quarterstaff
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage, or 4 (1d8) bludgeoning damage if used with two hands.

name: Spellcaster (Mage)
languages: Common, plus one of your choice

traits.name: Potent Cantrip
entries: The spellcaster can add its spellcasting ability modifier to the damage it deals with any cantrip.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Mage)
entries: The spellcaster's spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks). The spellcaster has following wizard spells prepared:
0: fire bolt, light, mage hand, minor illusion
1 (4 slots): burning hands, shield, sleep
2 (3 slots): flaming sphere, invisibility
3 (3 slots): fireball, fly
4 (1 slots): wall of fire

actions.name: Quarterstaff
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage, or 4 (1d8) bludgeoning damage if used with two hands.

traits.name: False Appearance
entries: While the statue remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an inanimate statue.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The statue makes five attacks: one with its headbutt and four with its lightning bolt blades.

actions.name: Headbutt
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage.

actions.name: Lightning Bolt Blades
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 9 (2d4 + 4) slashing damage.

name: Tooth-N-Claw
languages: understands Infernal but can't speak it

traits.name: Keen Hearing and Smell
entries: Tooth-N-Claw has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
entries: Tooth-N-Claw has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of its allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) cold damage.

actions.name: Freezing Breath 5
entries: Tooth-N-Claw exhales an icy blast in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

name: Warrior
languages: Common, plus one of your choice

traits.name: Battle Readiness
entries: The warrior has advantage on initiative rolls.

traits.name: Improved Critical
entries: The warrior's attack rolls score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20 on the d20.

traits.name: Martial Role
entries: The warrior has one of the following traits of your choice:

- Attacker The warrior gains a +2 bonus to attack rolls.
- Defender The warrior gains the Protection reaction below.

actions.name: Extra Attack
entries: The warrior can attack twice, instead of once, whenever it takes the Attack action on its turn.

actions.name: Longsword
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage, or 8 (1d10 + 3) slashing damage if used with two hands.

actions.name: Longbow
entries: *Ranged Weapon Attack:* +5 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. *Hit:* 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage.

reactions.name: Protection (Defender Only)
entries: The warrior imposes disadvantage on the attack roll of a creature within 5 feet of it whose target isn't the warrior. The warrior must be able to see the attacker.
